label: Part 02
text: In those days, there also lived an old soldier called Jack Hannaford. His coat was old and he was poor, but nobody thought that Jack Hannaford was stupid. He was sly like a fox. When he left the army, he walked all around the country, looking for ways to play his tricks. After he had traveled for some time, he came across the farm belonging to the pair. He knocked on the door of the house, and a moment later, the wife answered. She looked him up and down, quite astonished, because few strangers were able to make the difficult journey to their home. "Where did you come from?" she asked.

sentences.en: In those days, there also lived an old soldier called Jack Hannaford.
sentences.pt: Naqueles dias, existia também um velho soldado chamado Jack Hannaford.

sentences.en: His coat was old and he was poor,
sentences.pt: Seu casaco era velho e ele era pobre,

sentences.en: but nobody thought that Jack Hannaford was stupid.
sentences.pt: mas ninguém pensava que Jack Hannaford era estúpido / burro / bobo.

sentences.en: He was sly like a fox.
sentences.pt: Ele era astuto / malicioso como uma raposa.

sentences.en: he walked all around the country,
sentences.pt: ele caminhou por todo o país,

sentences.en: looking for ways to play his tricks.
sentences.pt: procurando por maneiras de fazer suas artimanhas.

sentences.en: After he had traveled for some time,
sentences.pt: Depois que ele tinha viajado por algum tempo,

sentences.en: he came across the farm belonging to the pair.
sentences.pt: ele deu de cara com a fazenda que pertencia ao casal.

sentences.en: He knocked on the door of the house,
sentences.pt: Ele bateu na porta da casa,

sentences.en: and a moment later, the wife answered.
sentences.pt: e pouco depois a esposa respondeu.

sentences.en: She looked him up and down, quite astonished,
sentences.pt: Ela olhou ele de cima a baixo, muito surpresa,

sentences.en: because few strangers were able to make the difficult journey to their home.
sentences.pt: porque poucos desconhecidos eram capazes de fazer a difícil jornada até a casa deles.

sentences.en: "Where did you come from?" she asked.
